allow: PowerShell($node = \(Get-Command node -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue\); if \($node\) { node -v } else { "node: NOT FOUND" }; $npm = \(Get-Command npm -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue\); if \($npm\) { "npm $\(npm -v\)" } else { "npm: NOT FOUND" }; $pnpm = \(Get-Command pnpm -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue\); if \($pnpm\) { "pnpm $\(pnpm -v\)" } else { "pnpm: NOT FOUND" }; $git = \(Get-Command git -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue\); if \($git\) { git --version } else { "git: NOT FOUND" })

Bash(git commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
Harden public booking flow and tenant isolation

Security audit-and-fix pass on the public booking surface:

- Add Redis-backed rate limiting \(IP/phone/salon\) plus a per-phone
  outbound-notification cap on /book, lighter limiting on /availability,
  and a Cloudflare Turnstile verification hook \(src/lib/ratelimit.ts,
  src/lib/turnstile.ts\).
- Re-validate the requested slot server-side inside createBooking via a
  shared isSlotBookable helper, rejecting past / out-of-hours / time-off
  slots that a direct /book call could otherwise smuggle in.
- Verify the WhatsApp webhook X-Hub-Signature-256 HMAC over the raw body
  with WHATSAPP_APP_SECRET before processing.
- Fail fast on placeholder/missing secrets in production via instrumentation
  \(src/lib/env.ts\).
- Stop public bookings from overwriting an existing customer''s record.
- Add withTenantScope so RLS engages on operational writes; document the
  prod non-owner role + db:rls requirements.
- Add CSP/HSTS/X-Frame-Options/nosniff/Referrer-Policy headers.
- Sanitize client-supplied name before it becomes a WhatsApp template var.
- Close the plan-limit check-then-increment race with an atomic guard.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")

Bash(git commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
Relax startup env guard to warn instead of crash

The production startup check was throwing on missing/placeholder secrets,
which took the entire app down \(including the static homepage\) on a
half-configured environment. Downgrade to warnings for now; re-tighten to
throw-in-production before launch \(TODO noted in src/lib/env.ts\).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")

Bash(git commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
Add local email/password auth and basic dashboard

Replace unused Clerk wiring with self-built email/password auth backed by
node:crypto \(scrypt hashing + HMAC-signed session cookie\), keeping all
credentials in our own database. Adds login/register/logout API routes,
login/register pages, and a session-guarded dashboard. Seeds a platform
admin and a salon owner account.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")
